title: EXT_mesh_polygon glTF Mesh Primitive Extension
description: glTF extension adding an encoding of polygon primitive topology

count.description: Integer number of polygons encoded in the mesh primitive.

loopIndices.description: Index of an accessor containing indices of the polygons' exterior and interior loops. The accessor MUST have SCALAR type and an unsigned integer component type.

loopIndicesOffsets.description: Index of an accessor containing one integer offset per polygon in the primitive, indicating the first index of the first linear ring associated with that polygon.

indicesOffsets.description: Index of an accessor containing one integer offset per polygon in the primitive, indicating the first index of the first triangle associated with that polygon.
